title: Implementing Fixed Window Rate Limiting for a Public API
statement:
Implement a Fixed Window rate limiter for a public API. This API allows users to make requests to the following endpoints:

Create a new resource: `POST /api/resource`
Get all resources: `GET /api/resource`
Delete a resource: `DELETE /api/resource/{id}`

The API should enforce a rate limit of 10 requests per second for each user. Implement a solution that uses the `express-rate-limit` package to handle rate limiting.

Please ensure that your implementation includes proper error handling and returns a suitable response to the user.

Visible endpoints should be exposed, while hidden endpoints should be used for testing the rate limiter's functionality and edge cases.

Use the provided `express-rate-limit` package to handle rate limiting. You can assume that user IDs are passed as a query parameter in the request.
constraints: Must use the `express-rate-limit` package to handle rate limiting.
Must use the `express.json()` middleware to parse request bodies.

endpoints.description: Returns a list of all resources.
